mission: Create the transcription and malware-scanning provisioning pack with a product-grade local evidence-processing lab now and a hard-gated real provider project, webhook, retention, region, and spend strategy later.

environment_profiles.label: Local rehearsal
environment_profiles.description: Pure local simulator mode with no provider traffic.

environment_profiles.label: Preview UI rehearsal
environment_profiles.description: Local simulator with preview-grade route and inspector behavior.

environment_profiles.label: Provider-like preprod
environment_profiles.description: Still mock-first, but shaped around the shortlisted provider surfaces and explicit region/retention policy.

environment_profiles.label: Actual provider later
environment_profiles.description: Disabled live posture blocked until gates and flags pass.

project_scopes.summary: Nonprod workspace for transcript callbacks, residency, and deletion policy.
Nonprod scanning boundary for bucket scope, quarantine, and callback/event wiring.
Future production candidate project boundary, kept blocked in seq_035.

shortlisted_vendors.retention_and_deletion_notes: Transcript deletion removes uploaded files; region selection and private deployment reduce retention ambiguity.
shortlisted_vendors.notes: AssemblyAI is strong on job callbacks, EU region selection, and deletion semantics. Like Deepgram, callback trust still needs Service-side replay fencing and trusted re-fetch.
shortlisted_vendors.portability_notes: Private deployment and explicit delete APIs keep exit posture workable.

shortlisted_vendors.retention_and_deletion_notes: Hosted service can callback results; private and self-hosted deployment options reduce retention lock-in.
shortlisted_vendors.notes: Focused transcription provider with strong async and streaming support. Callback authenticity remains a bounded weakness, so Service must treat callbacks as hints and re-fetch job state before promotion.
shortlisted_vendors.pricing_notes: Usage-priced with explicit developer and enterprise paths.
shortlisted_vendors.portability_notes: Private deployment options reduce lock-in risk relative to cloud-only providers.

shortlisted_vendors.retention_and_deletion_notes: Results stay in AWS control planes and S3 tags/events instead of direct file round-trips through a vendor callback endpoint.
shortlisted_vendors.notes: Best fit for quarantine-first artifact handling because results are event-driven, taggable, and explicit about failure or unsupported states. The tradeoff is AWS account coupling.
shortlisted_vendors.project_model: AWS account plus GuardDuty protection plan, IAM role, and EventBridge
shortlisted_vendors.sandbox_posture: cloud account and S3 prefix-scoped plans
shortlisted_vendors.pricing_notes: Per-object and per-GB pricing; strong need for spend boundaries.
shortlisted_vendors.portability_notes: Good event semantics, but higher account and storage coupling than API-key scanners.

shortlisted_vendors.retention_and_deletion_notes: Cloud-service regions and explicit API posture are documented; file handling remains more controllable than threat-intel-first services.
shortlisted_vendors.notes: Strong multi-engine scan vendor with explicit API docs and region story. It is weaker than GuardDuty on event-driven posture but stronger than lighter-weight API scanners for quarantine evidence.
shortlisted_vendors.pricing_notes: Commercial managed service; cost governance must be explicit.
shortlisted_vendors.portability_notes: API posture is clear, but multi-engine semantics still need adapter-bound normalization.

selected_access_rows.notes: Mock scanning project principal for quarantine workflow rehearsal.

selected_access_rows.exposure_constraints: Synthetic-only material; never mix with live partner outputs or live patient-like identifiers.
selected_access_rows.notes: Synthetic malware-signature corpus and known-bad evidence pack.

selected_access_rows.exposure_constraints: No markdown literals, no console echo, no trace/video capture, screenshots only after explicit redaction, runtime reference handles only.

selected_access_rows.notes: Mock transcription project principal for readiness-state rehearsal.

selected_access_rows.exposure_constraints: No markdown literals, no console echo, no trace/video capture, screenshots only after explicit redaction, runtime reference handles only.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Webhooks
official_vendor_guidance.summary: AssemblyAI supports callbacks with optional webhook-auth headers and retries callbacks for up to 24 hours.
grounding: Callback delivery is asynchronous and retry-driven.
Webhook authentication is configured with a custom header name and value.
Callback arrival is transport evidence only until Service re-fetches and settles the transcript contract.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Select the EU Region for EU Data Residency
official_vendor_guidance.summary: AssemblyAI documents explicit region selection for EU processing.
grounding: Region is an explicit request configuration, not an implied default.
The local pack therefore blocks real project progression without a named region posture.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Delete a transcript
official_vendor_guidance.summary: AssemblyAI exposes transcript deletion through the API.
grounding: Deletion is an explicit follow-on operation.
Retention cannot be assumed from job completion alone.

official_vendor_guidance.title: AssemblyAI pricing
grounding: Real project creation and live traffic are spend-bearing actions.
Spend gates must therefore stay explicit and separate from mutation gates.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Managing Projects
official_vendor_guidance.summary: Deepgram treats projects as the workspace boundary for API keys, usage, and configuration.
grounding: Projects are a first-class account surface.
The live pack models project identifiers as environment-bound evidence, never as canonical truth.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Create Additional API Keys
official_vendor_guidance.summary: Deepgram documents project-scoped API key creation.
grounding: API keys are separable from the base account.
The pack therefore models project and credential ownership independently.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Using Callbacks to Return Transcripts to Your Server
official_vendor_guidance.summary: Deepgram supports callback-based result delivery for prerecorded transcription jobs.
grounding: Callbacks return after job completion and must be treated as hints.
Service must re-fetch or reconcile job state before promotion.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Deployment Options
official_vendor_guidance.summary: Deepgram offers hosted, on-prem, and private deployment patterns.
grounding: Deployment model is a real architecture choice, not a cosmetic setting.
The pack records deployment mode so region and retention drift cannot stay implicit.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Deepgram pricing
official_vendor_guidance.summary: Deepgram publishes commercial pricing for speech-to-text workloads.
grounding: Live use is billable.
Spend controls are mandatory even when technical readiness is present.

official_vendor_guidance.vendor: AWS GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3
official_vendor_guidance.title: Enabling Malware Protection for Amazon S3
official_vendor_guidance.summary: GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3 is configured as a protection plan tied to an S3 bucket scope, IAM role, and optional prefix filters.
grounding: Storage scope is part of the project boundary.
Prefix filtering is explicit, so the pack blocks real rollout without object-scope declaration.

official_vendor_guidance.vendor: AWS GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3
official_vendor_guidance.title: How Malware Protection for Amazon S3 works
official_vendor_guidance.summary: GuardDuty scans new objects and writes results through control-plane events and object tagging rather than direct file-return callbacks.
grounding: Scan completion is not a content-promotion permission by itself.
Event and tag results stay evidence inputs until quarantine law is satisfied.

official_vendor_guidance.vendor: AWS GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3
official_vendor_guidance.title: Monitoring Malware Protection for S3 with EventBridge
official_vendor_guidance.summary: GuardDuty publishes result states to EventBridge, including no-threat, threats-found, unsupported, and access-failure style outcomes.
grounding: The result stream is multi-state.
The local lab must preserve unreadable, failed, and quarantined branches rather than flatten to pass or fail.

official_vendor_guidance.vendor: AWS GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3
official_vendor_guidance.title: Monitoring Malware Protection for S3 scan results
official_vendor_guidance.summary: GuardDuty documents per-object result states and scan metadata.
grounding: Per-object result states are part of the evidence contract.
The pack keeps those states distinct from downstream usability decisions.

official_vendor_guidance.vendor: AWS GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3
official_vendor_guidance.title: Pricing for Malware Protection for Amazon S3
official_vendor_guidance.summary: AWS prices GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3 per object and storage volume processed.
grounding: Live scan enablement is billable immediately.
Real plan activation remains behind explicit spend approval.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Public APIs
official_vendor_guidance.summary: MetaDefender Cloud uses API keys tied to registered users and limited call quotas.
grounding: API key ownership is user or organization scoped.
Quota posture must be recorded alongside mutation controls.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Private Scanning with MetaDefender Cloud APIs
official_vendor_guidance.summary: MetaDefender Cloud supports private processing so uploads are removed after analysis and only the submitting owner can access results.
grounding: Private processing is an explicit flag, not a default.
The pack blocks live usage until private processing posture is declared.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Retrieving Scan Results Via Webhooks
official_vendor_guidance.summary: MetaDefender Cloud supports a `callbackurl` upload header that posts results after scan completion.
grounding: Webhook delivery is optional and callback-url driven.
The pack models callback security and retry policy independently from the scan request itself.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Locations
official_vendor_guidance.summary: MetaDefender Cloud publishes named regional endpoints and states that uploaded files stay in the designated server location.
grounding: Region endpoint selection is explicit and material.
Non-private mode can store uploaded files indefinitely, so retention posture must be frozen before live use.

official_vendor_guidance.title: Licenses and Usage Limits
official_vendor_guidance.summary: MetaDefender Cloud enforces license and usage limits at the individual or organization boundary.
grounding: Usage quotas are part of the live project model.
The real-later pack therefore includes explicit spend and usage guardrails.

field_rows.label: Project scope
field_rows.notes: Workspace boundary for nonprod transcript jobs.

field_rows.label: Webhook base URL
field_rows.notes: Base callback URL for result delivery.

field_rows.label: Region policy ref
field_rows.notes: Must be explicit before live setup.

field_rows.label: Partial results mode
field_rows.notes: Partial results stay distinct from ready.

field_rows.label: Private deployment mode
field_rows.notes: Private deployment is a later architecture choice.

field_rows.label: Transcript redaction profile
field_rows.notes: Avoids provider-side PHI drift during rehearsal.

field_rows.label: Delete-after-assimilation mode
field_rows.notes: Deletion call follows successful evidence capture.

region_policies.label: Local-only simulator region
region_policies.operator_rule: No external provider traffic; all assets stay local to the workstation or development host.
region_policies.notes: Default mock lane during seq_035 execution.

region_policies.label: Explicit EU transcript processing
region_policies.operator_rule: Real transcript jobs may run only when the provider project is explicitly fixed to an EU-compatible posture.
region_policies.notes: AssemblyAI and Deepgram both require an explicit residency declaration in the pack.

region_policies.label: AWS EU bucket and event path
region_policies.operator_rule: GuardDuty protection plans must be attached only to EU-resident buckets aligned to the target trust zone.
region_policies.notes: Bucket scope and prefix scope are part of the plan contract.

region_policies.label: Forced EU MetaDefender endpoint
region_policies.operator_rule: Use the EU Central API endpoint and block non-private processing for any patient-adjacent file.
region_policies.notes: MetaDefender Cloud can force a specific regional endpoint.

retention_policies.label: Transient transcript payloads
retention_policies.notes: Provider-held transcript payloads are deleted after local evidence assimilation or failed-job closure.

retention_policies.label: Redacted transcript review bundle
retention_policies.notes: Redacted review material is kept only for bounded fallback review.

retention_policies.label: Scan result tags and callback envelopes
retention_policies.notes: Control-plane proof is retained longer than raw files.

retention_policies.label: Quarantined artifacts
retention_policies.notes: Unreadable, suspicious, and failed-scan items remain quarantined until an explicit operator action completes.

quarantine_policies.label: Hold until clean verdict
quarantine_policies.release_rule: release only after clean scan plus policy match

quarantine_policies.label: Suspicious requires manual review
quarantine_policies.release_rule: manual review can release or destroy, never auto-pass

quarantine_policies.label: Unreadable requires reacquire
quarantine_policies.release_rule: request reacquire or alternate evidence path

quarantine_policies.label: Scan failure escalates
quarantine_policies.release_rule: escalate and keep blocked until operator closes

quarantine_policies.label: Superseded transcript requires rebind
quarantine_policies.release_rule: replacement transcript must be bound before any readiness promotion

webhook_profiles.notes: AssemblyAI retries callback delivery for up to 24 hours.
Deepgram callbacks are hints and must be reconciled with fetched job state.
GuardDuty results are consumed from EventBridge and object metadata, not raw file callbacks.
MetaDefender Cloud can post results to a caller-specified callback URL.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Exercise partial transcript readiness after clean artifact admission.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Maps to a real nonprod project with explicit webhook and deletion posture.
job_profiles.notes: Local default for callback transcript rehearsal.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Validate explicit residency and callback-hint semantics.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Becomes the real provider-like staging workspace.
job_profiles.notes: Provider-like preview does not permit real mutation during seq_035.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Exercise portal-upload transcript review without implying usable evidence.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Can map to later provider ingestion after scan and quarantine pass.
job_profiles.notes: Transcript completion remains weaker than evidence usability.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Prove supersession and replacement transcript binding.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Models operator-driven retry after poor transcript quality.
job_profiles.notes: Superseded transcript must not continue to drive readiness.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Force transcript readiness to wait on scan verdict and fallback review.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Maps to production evidence gate for patient-submitted audio.
job_profiles.notes: A clean transcript cannot overrule a bad or unreadable scan branch.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Exercise clean path without collapsing quarantine release law.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Can map to cloud scan API or object-event scanning later.
job_profiles.notes: Clean does not equal clinically usable.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Show operator hold and review flows.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Models suspicious verdict handling for real file providers.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Exercise object-scope and eventbridge-style ingestion law.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Maps to GuardDuty S3 protection plans later.
job_profiles.notes: Real plan enablement remains gated and billable.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Exercise unreadable evidence and reacquire fallback.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Maps to later file-scan provider error-handling.
job_profiles.notes: Unreadable is distinct from failed and suspicious.

job_profiles.mock_now_use: Simulate object-event scanning with result tags and fallback hold.
job_profiles.actual_later_use: Becomes the real S3-backed protection-plan path.
job_profiles.notes: Storage plan and event bus are first-class contract fields.

scan_and_quarantine_policy_rows.notes: Even clean verdicts wait for release and evidence binding.
Suspicious files stay blocked until an operator decides.
Unreadable evidence stays distinct from hard failure.
Failure never counts as implicit pass-through.
Blocks live MetaDefender use without private processing.
Unsigned callback remains only a hint.
Partial transcript output cannot settle evidence usability.
Failed transcription does not close the evidence branch.
Superseded jobs cannot keep downstream readiness alive.
Ready transcript is still blocked while webhook authenticity is unresolved.

transcript_scenarios.label: Partial then ready
transcript_scenarios.summary: Transcript streams through partial results and lands ready, but still waits on evidence promotion.

timeline_templates.label: job accepted
timeline_templates.detail: Audio accepted into the transcript queue.

timeline_templates.label: partial transcript available
timeline_templates.detail: Partial text is present but not yet admissible.

timeline_templates.label: evidence readiness still gated
timeline_templates.detail: Service still requires evidence binding and policy checks.

transcript_scenarios.label: Failed, retry needed
transcript_scenarios.summary: Transcript processing fails and shifts the branch into bounded fallback review.

timeline_templates.label: fallback review required
timeline_templates.detail: Evidence branch remains unresolved and review is mandatory.

transcript_scenarios.label: Superseded by replacement
transcript_scenarios.summary: A weak transcript remains in hold until an operator supersedes it with a replacement run.

timeline_templates.label: low-confidence partial
timeline_templates.detail: Transcript quality is insufficient for safe progression.

timeline_templates.label: supersession hold
timeline_templates.detail: Operator must create a replacement transcript.

supersede_timeline_templates.label: job superseded
supersede_timeline_templates.detail: Original transcript can no longer drive readiness.

supersede_timeline_templates.label: replacement transcript requested
supersede_timeline_templates.detail: A new transcript run must replace the old binding.

transcript_scenarios.label: Ready transcript, unsigned callback
transcript_scenarios.summary: Provider says the transcript is ready, but the callback authenticity failed and the branch stays held.

timeline_templates.label: callback signature failed
timeline_templates.detail: Callback trust failed; do not promote the result.

retry_timeline_templates.label: webhook signature validated
retry_timeline_templates.detail: Retry path re-established authenticity and re-fetch succeeded.

retry_timeline_templates.label: review gate reopened
retry_timeline_templates.detail: Transcript is now admissible for the next evidence check.

transcript_scenarios.label: Transcript complete, evidence still review-held
transcript_scenarios.summary: Transcript is available but the evidence branch remains held because the related scan branch has not cleared.

timeline_templates.label: manual review hold
timeline_templates.detail: Cross-branch evidence checks still block progression.

scan_scenarios.label: Clean verdict, pending release
scan_scenarios.summary: Scan is clean but the artifact stays held until release checks complete.

scan_scenarios.label: Suspicious, manual review required
scan_scenarios.summary: Scan shows a suspicious result and the artifact remains quarantined until review closes.

timeline_templates.label: suspicious signal raised
timeline_templates.detail: The provider reported a suspicious verdict.

timeline_templates.label: artifact quarantined
timeline_templates.detail: The artifact stays blocked until manual review.

review_timeline_templates.label: manual review complete
review_timeline_templates.detail: Review concluded but does not imply automatic release.

scan_scenarios.label: Quarantined hard block
scan_scenarios.summary: Artifact is quarantined and must not proceed without an explicit destroy or escalation decision.

timeline_templates.label: quarantine hard block
timeline_templates.detail: Threat verdict triggered the quarantine fence.

review_timeline_templates.label: security review complete
review_timeline_templates.detail: Security review finished, awaiting explicit destroy or retain decision.

scan_scenarios.label: Unreadable and reacquire
scan_scenarios.summary: Artifact cannot be scanned and the user or operator must reacquire it.

timeline_templates.label: artifact unreadable
timeline_templates.detail: Artifact could not be parsed or scanned.

timeline_templates.label: reacquire required
timeline_templates.detail: No promotion path exists until a new artifact arrives.

scan_scenarios.label: Result arrived with callback trust failure
scan_scenarios.summary: The scan result appears clean but stays held because the callback trust path failed.

timeline_templates.label: callback trust failed
timeline_templates.detail: Ingest trust failed, so the verdict cannot drive release.

retry_timeline_templates.label: callback validated
retry_timeline_templates.detail: Retry path revalidated the callback or refetch proof.

retry_timeline_templates.label: held pending release
retry_timeline_templates.detail: Result is authentic but still needs release confirmation.

review_timeline_templates.label: release approved
review_timeline_templates.detail: Release decision completed after callback validation.

seeded_transcript_jobs.summary: Transcript streams through partial results and lands ready, but still waits on evidence promotion.

timeline_events.detail: Partial text is present but not yet admissible.

timeline_events.label: evidence readiness still gated
timeline_events.detail: Service still requires evidence binding and policy checks.

seeded_transcript_jobs.summary: Provider says the transcript is ready, but the callback authenticity failed and the branch stays held.

timeline_events.detail: Callback trust failed; do not promote the result.

seeded_transcript_jobs.summary: Transcript is available but the evidence branch remains held because the related scan branch has not cleared.

seeded_transcript_jobs.summary: A weak transcript remains in hold until an operator supersedes it with a replacement run.

timeline_events.detail: Transcript quality is insufficient for safe progression.

timeline_events.label: supersession hold

timeline_events.detail: The provider reported a suspicious verdict.

live_gates.title: Phase 0 external-readiness chain is clear
live_gates.reason: Phase 0 entry remains withheld, so no real provider mutation may start.

live_gates.title: Provider is on the seq_034 shortlist
live_gates.reason: Only shortlisted providers may be configured later.

live_gates.title: Region policy is explicit
live_gates.reason: Provider project creation stays blocked until region posture is named.

live_gates.title: Retention and deletion policy is explicit
live_gates.reason: Deletion or retention cannot be inferred from job completion.

live_gates.title: Webhook security and replay controls are ready
live_gates.reason: Unsigned or replayed callbacks must stay non-authoritative.

live_gates.title: Bucket or storage scope is declared
live_gates.reason: Storage and prefix scope are part of the scanning contract.

live_gates.title: Quarantine policy is frozen
live_gates.reason: Clean, suspicious, unreadable, and failed branches cannot collapse into one badge.

live_gates.title: Named approver and target environment are present
live_gates.reason: Live mutations require a named human approver and environment target.

live_gates.title: ALLOW_REAL_PROVIDER_MUTATION is true
live_gates.reason: Real provider changes must fail closed without the mutation flag.

live_gates.title: ALLOW_SPEND is true for billable actions
live_gates.reason: Project creation and live traffic can incur spend immediately.

live_gates.title: Final operator acknowledgement is captured
live_gates.reason: Real project setup is blocked until a human acknowledges the live posture and artifact sensitivity.
